query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: Vertical abstract composition dominated by swirling fields of warm color. Central bright white-yellow light radiates outward into overlapping zones of amber, orange, and golden yellow. Red and magenta streaks cascade down the left edge in thin, branching lines. Greenish tones appear in the upper portion, partially obscured by the luminous overlay. Forms are indistinct and layered, suggesting motion and superimposition of multiple scenes.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred and double-exposed vertical composition with layered ghosted light traces. A blown-out white-yellow light source at center radiates through swirling amber, orange, and warm golden fields that bleed into each other with no fixed focal point. The left edge features red and magenta light streaks resembling degraded film trails or electrical discharge. Greenish tones in the upper area show color inconsistency and tonal breakup. Surfaces dissolve entirely into luminous abstraction with no discernible subject, texture, or edge resolution, evoking analog film decay through streaking, surface noise, and the impression of multiple overlapping exposures captured during camera movement.
